channel.name: scaling_updates

post.message: Hello team, just a reminder that we have a team meeting scheduled for tomorrow at 2 PM to discuss the progress of our current projects.
Thanks for the reminder, John. I will be sharing some updates on the compliance aspects of our new product.
Team, we are experiencing a slight delay in the implementation of our infrastructure updates due to some unforeseen technical issues. We are working to resolve this and will keep you updated.
I appreciate the update, Jane. Please let me know if there are any compliance matters that need to be addressed in this process.
Will do, Emma. Also, I've received some valuable customer feedback on our beta product that I think could be useful for our meeting tomorrow.
Just a heads up, we will need to schedule a maintenance window for our servers next week due to the infrastructure updates. I will share the exact date and time soon.
Sure thing, Jane. It's important to keep our systems secure and up to date. Looking forward to the details.

Hey team, quick staffing update from the IT division. During FY2025, we've onboarded 12 new software engineers to support our product development and infrastructure scaling efforts. This is part of our ongoing commitment to strengthening our tech capabilities and ensuring we have the right resources in place.

Thanks for the update, Emma. It's great to see MediConn investing in our tech capabilities. Onboarding these new engineers will certainly help us deliver better and more efficient solutions to our clients.

Just shared the same update with the product development team, but wanted to let you all know as well. We've added 12 new software engineers to our IT team in FY2025, specifically to support infrastructure scaling. This is separate from our Indigenous healthcare data governance or compliance integration efforts.
That's great news, Emma! More hands on deck will definitely help us manage and scale our growing infrastructure more effectively.
